case_title: SIX RIVERS NATIONAL BANK VS NEMETZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MONTY AGARWAL IN SUPP OF PETNR'S PETN TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
MOTION CONFIRM ARB AWARD GRANT, NO OPP FILED. REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH
MEMO OF P&A IN SUPP OF PETN TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT NEMETZ, FRANK H $319,210.30 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $319,210.30, TOGETHER WITH INTEREST ON THAT SUM AT THE RATE SPECIFIED IN AWARD FOR EACH DAY AFTER 7/30/01. SEE SCANNED DOC. ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND JUDGMENT)
NTC OF PETN TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR MOTION: CONFIRM AWARD HEARING SET FOR SEP-27-2001 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
